title: Planning commission and development board mutually exclusive
doc_html:
§130.  Planning commission and development board mutually exclusive

No parish may create or maintain in existence at the same time both a planning commission and a development board.  The maintenance and existence of one shall exclude the creation and maintenance of the other.
doc_text:
§130.  Planning commission and development board mutually exclusive
No parish may create or maintain in existence at the same time both a planning commission and a development board.  The maintenance and existence of one shall exclude the creation and maintenance of the other.
